description: Mysterious document. Perhaps a death notice? Gives the name Yefet b. [...]ṭ ha-Kohen (ZL) and then the date Friday, 16 Tammuz 1466 Seleucid, which is 1155 CE, then "salām ʿalā Yisrael." On verso there is Hebrew piyyut.
description_he: ביהודית-ערבית מהמאה ה-12. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
